title: more mobs
description: did you ever want more mobs? well if then try my more mobs mod it adds 10 different types of mobs including a new wolf to the game!
body: did you ever want more mobs in minecraft? well try downloading my mod it adds 10 mobs to the game and 5 items to the game and one of those mobs are a new dog! well sure it is follows you around EVERYWHERE you go just to proctect you. you can even feed it a treat! there are also 3 achevements you can get in my mod. all achievements will be in the adventure tab. you can also get a crab leg cook it to get a cooked crab leg. i don't want to spoil everything so you will have to see for yourself. NEEDS GECKOLIB TO WORK
